title: Deployment Decision Resolution and Architecture Lock
description: Convert an explicit human RC2 deployment disposition into a governed architecture baseline, or preserve the pending decision as a fail-closed blocker without inferring a hosting or production choice.
acceptance_criteria: An explicit human RC2 disposition is bound to the exact candidate hash before any architecture lock
APPROVE, APPROVE WITH CONDITIONS, DEFER, and REJECT produce distinguishable governed outcomes
No hosting provider or production architecture is inferred from TEST evidence or sprint completion
Any approved conditions become explicit prerequisites with owners, evidence requirements, and stop conditions
A defer or reject outcome preserves the validated software baseline and historical decision lineage

evidence.description: Exact human APPROVE disposition for the bound RC2 candidate.
CF-NEON-R2 architecture lock with production and external gates preserved.
